project_privacy_data_flows.data_type: Camera Video/Audio Stream (Received from HA server)
project_privacy_data_flows.description: Live camera streaming via WebRTC. Video received from HA server via ICE/TURN; rendered locally via RTCMTLVideoView. Audio playback only — microphone never used. PlaybackOnlyRTCAudioDevice explicitly disables audio input.

flow_steps.details: User taps camera entity; player view initialized with server and entity ID.

flow_steps.code: required init(iceServers:) { config.iceServers = [RTCIceServer(urlStrings: iceServers)]; peerConnection = factory.peerConnection(with: config, constraints:) }
flow_steps.details: WebRTC peer connection established with HA server via ICE/TURN for NAT traversal.

flow_steps.code: final class PlaybackOnlyRTCAudioDevice: NSObject, RTCAudioDevice { var inputNumberOfChannels: Int { 0 }; func startRecording() -> Bool { isRecording = false; return true } }
flow_steps.details: Custom RTCAudioDevice that explicitly disables microphone input. Playback-only audio for camera streams.

flow_steps.code: private func createMediaTracks() { let videoTrack = createVideoTrack(); peerConnection.add(videoTrack, streamIds: ["stream"]) }
flow_steps.details: Remote video track received and rendered via RTCVideoRenderer (RTCMTLVideoView). Remote audio track received and played via system audio.

project_privacy_data_flows.data_type: Camera MJPEG Stream (Received from HA server)
project_privacy_data_flows.description: MJPEG camera stream fetched via HTTP request. Frames rendered as UIImage sequence from received JPEG data.

flow_steps.details: HTTP connection to HA camera proxy. MJPEG boundary-delimited JPEG frames received and rendered.

project_privacy_data_flows.data_type: Camera HLS Stream (Received from HA server)
project_privacy_data_flows.description: HLS camera stream played via AVPlayer. Video/audio segments fetched from HA server over HTTPS.

flow_steps.details: HLS stream URL loaded into AVPlayer. Video/audio segments fetched from HA server.
